  "title": "Van Delivery Representative",
  "description": "Abelinis is a full-service brand experience agency, specializing in event and experiential marketing. We unite brands with their target audiences through live experiences, digital engagement and traditional marketing. With strategic insight, inspired creative, and flawless execution, Abelinis tells your story and brings your brand message to life.

We provide a comprehensive end to end event management service that spans a range of services, from venue sourcing to onsite presence and post event reporting. We can provide as little or as much support as you require, whether you&rsquo;re putting on a small CXO dinner or a huge annual conference.

At Abelinis we also ensure that your event is delivered to the highest possible standard with a bit of added &lsquo;pizzazz&rsquo;. Whether you are looking for an elaborate stage set, some lighting to set the mood or a theme to bind your event together or filming and live streaming; we can supply the creativity, equipment and manpower to produce everything from gala dinners and parties to memorable award ceremonies. Working with large, established international suppliers as well as smaller, regional audio visual companies, we have developed, and continue to develop, excellent relationships within the production and event equipment sector.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Van Delivery Representative
&nbsp;Job Locations: Aba-Abia, Abakaliki-Ebonyi, Asaba, Warri-Delta, Enugu, Port Harcourt - Rivers, Owerri-Imo, &nbsp;Bayelsa
Industry: FMCG
Employment Type: Full-Time

Job Summary


	As a VDR, you will play a key role in driving product availability, building customer relationships, and delivering monthly sales objectives across assigned territories.


Key Responsibilities


	Achieve daily and monthly sales targets across assigned outlets.
	Ensure daily reconciliation of sales, cash, and stock&mdash;zero-credit policy applies.
	Operate within the approved stock allocation limit.
	Drive distribution and visibility of all products in the market.
	Maintain strong relationships with Key Distributors and resolve field issues promptly.
	Ensure accurate reporting, documentation, and timely submission of sales reports.
	Guarantee proper in-market execution, pricing compliance, and product availability.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	100% Sales Target Achievement
	Zero Debt Compliance
	95%+ Market Execution Standards
	Accurate Daily Reconciliation
	Timely Reporting (Daily/Weekly/Monthly)
	100% Product Availability in Assigned Outlets


Requirements


	Minimum of OND / HND / BSc in any discipline
	1&ndash;3 years of experience in sales (FMCG experience is an added advantage)
	Valid driver&rsquo;s license
	Proper Driving Experience
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to work in a fast-paced, target-driven environment
	Good knowledge of the assigned market terrain
	Must be result-oriented, disciplined, and accountable
	Must be technologically inclined.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;recruitment@abelinisng.com&nbsp;using &quot;Van Sales Representative&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Van Delivery Representative Job at Abelinis




        
    

        
        Abelinis is a full-service brand experience agency, specializing in event and experiential marketing. We unite brands with their target audiences through live experiences, digital engagement and traditional marketing. With strategic insight, inspired creative, and flawless execution, Abelinis tells your story and brings your brand message to life.

We provide a comprehensive end to end event management service that spans a range of services, from venue sourcing to onsite presence and post event reporting. We can provide as little or as much support as you require, whether you’re putting on a small CXO dinner or a huge annual conference.

At Abelinis we also ensure that your event is delivered to the highest possible standard with a bit of added ‘pizzazz’. Whether you are looking for an elaborate stage set, some lighting to set the mood or a theme to bind your event together or filming and live streaming; we can supply the creativity, equipment and manpower to produce everything from gala dinners and parties to memorable award ceremonies. Working with large, established international suppliers as well as smaller, regional audio visual companies, we have developed, and continue to develop, excellent relationships within the production and event equipment sector.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Van Delivery Representative
 Job Locations: Aba-Abia, Abakaliki-Ebonyi, Asaba, Warri-Delta, Enugu, Port Harcourt - Rivers, Owerri-Imo,  Bayelsa
Industry: FMCG
Employment Type: Full-Time

Job Summary


	As a VDR, you will play a key role in driving product availability, building customer relationships, and delivering monthly sales objectives across assigned territories.


Key Responsibilities


	Achieve daily and monthly sales targets across assigned outlets.
	Ensure daily reconciliation of sales, cash, and stock—zero-credit policy applies.
	Operate within the approved stock allocation limit.
	Drive distribution and visibility of all products in the market.
	Maintain strong relationships with Key Distributors and resolve field issues promptly.
	Ensure accurate reporting, documentation, and timely submission of sales reports.
	Guarantee proper in-market execution, pricing compliance, and product availability.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	100% Sales Target Achievement
	Zero Debt Compliance
	95%+ Market Execution Standards
	Accurate Daily Reconciliation
	Timely Reporting (Daily/Weekly/Monthly)
	100% Product Availability in Assigned Outlets


Requirements


	Minimum of OND / HND / BSc in any discipline
	1–3 years of experience in sales (FMCG experience is an added advantage)
	Valid driver’s license
	Proper Driving Experience
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to work in a fast-paced, target-driven environment
	Good knowledge of the assigned market terrain
	Must be result-oriented, disciplined, and accountable
	Must be technologically inclined.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Van Sales Representative" as the subject of the email.

	Ensure compliance with health, safety, and security regulations.
	Coordinate with suppliers and vendors for timely delivery of goods and services.
	Promote teamwork and communication between departments to enhance operational efficiency.


Method of Application&nbsp;

Hotel Operations Supervisor Job at Greywood Hotels & Apartments




        
    

        
        Greywood Hotels & Apartments is situated in a serene and well-secured environment. We pride ourselves in providing clean and comfortable accomodation to all our guests which includes work professionals, corporate entities etc. If perfect relexationis your desire, Greywood Hotels & Apartments is definitely the ideal place to be.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Hotel Operations Supervisor

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a highly organized and hands-on Hotel Operations Supervisor to oversee and coordinate the daily activities of our hotel departments.
	The ideal candidate will work closely with department heads to ensure smooth operations, maintain service quality, and guarantee guest satisfaction.
	This role is key to ensuring the hotel runs efficiently and profitably.


Key Responsibilities


	Supervise and coordinate the activities of key hotel departments, including Front Office, Housekeeping, Food & Beverage, and Maintenance.
	Monitor daily operations to ensure service standards, cleanliness, and guest satisfaction are consistently met.
	Work closely with the General Manager to implement operational strategies and meet hotel performance goals.
	Handle guest complaints promptly and professionally, ensuring effective resolution and improved guest experience.
	Conduct daily inspections of rooms, public areas, and back-of-house areas to ensure compliance with hotel standards.
	Assist in scheduling staff shifts, monitoring attendance, and maintaining productivity across departments.
	Support recruitment, training, and development of staff to ensure consistent service quality.
	Prepare and submit operational reports, including occupancy rates, guest feedback, and departmental performance.
	Ensure compliance with health, safety, and security regulations.
	Coordinate with suppliers and vendors for timely delivery of goods and services.
	Promote teamwork and communication between departments to enhance operational efficiency.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Job Position: Head of Internal Audit

	Provide strategic advisory on risk, governance, and control enhancements, collaborating with key stakeholders to strengthen the organisation’s risk framework.
	Lead, mentor, and develop a high performing audit team while fostering a culture of integrity, objectivity, and continuous improvement.
	Serve as the primary point of contact for auditors, regulators, and senior leadership on all audit related matters.

  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Cloud Infrastructure Engineer",
  "description": "Unified Payment Services Limited is a group of companies with services including Banking, Payment Scheme, Financial Technology, Digital Commerce, Value Added Service, Payment Solutions, Software Solutions, etc. Unified Payments is a principal member or licensed acquirer of American Express, Mastercard, Visa and UnionPay; and has been instrumental in building the infrastructure that supports Nigeria&rsquo;s modern payments ecosystem.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Cloud Infrastructure Engineer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Objectives


	The Cloud Infrastructure Engineer designs, implements, and maintains the cloud-based infrastructure that supports an organization&#39;s computing needs.
	This role involves working with cloud platforms (like AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud), deploying scalable and secure infrastructure, and ensuring high availability and performance.
	Ensure the integrity of the network and security infrastructure of the company.


Duties &amp; Responsibilities


	Design and implement cloud architecture to meet business and technical requirements, ensuring scalability, security, and cost-effectiveness.
	Use orchestration tools like Kubernetes to automate containerized application deployment and management on the cloud.
	Implement cloud security best practices, such as identity and access management (IAM), encryption, firewalls, and monitoring for compliance with security policies.
	Provide technical support to development teams in deploying, managing, and scaling cloud-based applications.
	Collaborate with developers and IT teams to plan, deploy, and manage cloud resources such as virtual machines, networks, and storage.
	Develop and implement automation scripts using tools such as Terraform for efficient deployment and management of cloud resources.
	Conduct regular security assessments and vulnerability testing to identify and mitigate risks within the cloud infrastructure.
	Work closely with software developers and other stakeholders to integrate infrastructure with applications and service


Requirements


	Education: Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Computer Science, Information Security, or related fields
	Experience: Minimum of 5 years of experience as a system administrator, network engineer, Devops engineer, cloud engineer, or a similar role in a security operations environment.


General Experience:
Technical Skills:


	Expertise in setting up and managing EC2 (Elastic Compute Cloud) instances, S3 (Simple Storage Service) for data storage, VPC (Virtual Private Cloud) for networking, RDS (Relational Database Service), and other core services.
	Expertise in writing configuration files, managing state files, and using Terraform modules for reusability across environments.
	Experience in creating, deploying, and managing containerized applications. This includes writing Dockerfiles, working with container registries like Docker Hub, and managing container images.
	Proficiency in Python, Bash or Powershell for automating cloud infrastructure tasks.
	Knowledge of Jenkins for continuous integration/continuous delivery pipelines, enabling the automation of code deployments to cloud environments, is required.
	Proficiency with RDS (AWS), Azure SQL Database, Cloud SQL (GCP), and NoSQL databases like DynamoDB (AWS), CosmosDB (Azure), and Firestore (GCP) for managing cloud-based databases.
	Proficiency in orchestrating containerized applications using Kubernetes, including deploying, scaling, and managing clusters.


Method of Application&nbsp;

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Cloud Infrastructure Engineer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Objectives
